description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious outdoor area. The exterior features a mix of light-colored plaster and wood paneling, complemented by large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a fenced patio. The yard includes mature trees, a wooden deck with outdoor seating, a large umbrella, and a circular hot tub. The house is surrounded by a low wooden fence and has a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced patio featuring trees, a deck, and a hot tub.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, large trees, and the patio area with outdoor seating and a sun umbrella.
description_view_1: The front yard is visible with a circular hot tub, paved walkway, and the wooden fence enclosing the outdoor space.
description_view_2: The rear of the house shows the main door, wood paneling, and the continuation of the patio and trees.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the flat roof, trellis structure, and the dense tree coverage on one side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with adjacent large windows, no steps, and a paved walkway leading to a fenced patio.
